user_request: Make me the complete easiest implementation plan for STRONGARM, a local model that audits my five-stack AI brain so it stops under-answering.
draft_answer: Build STRONGARM as a one-file local sidecar first. Use Ollama with qwen3:0.6b and JSON schema output. The sidecar exposes POST /verdict and POST /rewrite_prompt. Each five-stack model sends its draft answer to STRONGARM. STRONGARM returns PASS, REWRITE, ESCALATE, or BLOCK with scores and rewrite orders. Store every audit in receipts/. Do not fine-tune until at least 500 real receipts exist. The v0 command set is: doctor, pull, judge, interactive, server, and demo. The control rule is simple: PASS ships, REWRITE loops once, ESCALATE calls tools or stronger model, BLOCK returns the strongest lawful alternative.
project_context: STRONGARM is a local Misfit/Rebel critic that produces verdict JSON and rewrite prompts.
